author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Replaced two-pass mean-then-sum-of-squared-deviations with single-pass Welford accumulator. One iteration over the masked data instead of two, and numerically more stable for large-offset data.

Test added: values [1e9 + 1, ..., 1e9 + 5] give variance 2.0 within 1e-9 (the two-pass form was off by ~1e-7 at this scale).

ferray-ma: 197 -> 198 lib tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit a4ff11b4.
